creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unlike the other chapters in the FreeBSD Handbook, the Jails chapter has no standalone Makefile.

Fix: Add a chapter Makefile based on handbook/x11/Makefile

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Noticed at http://people.freebsd.org/~pgj/checkupdate/fdp.nl.diffs.txt
